summary: Fantastic show with a smoking "The Other One" jam, great Wharf Rat and a sweet close, though the recording source isn’t specified.
review: Reviewers rave about this performance – the Other One jam is described as “awesome” and even contains a clear James Bond theme quote from Brent’s keyboards, while classics like Wharf Rat, Around > Sugar Magnolia and Baby Blue are highlighted. The show is called solid all the way through with a magical vibe, but none of the reviewers comment on the technical side of the recording.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviews are 4‑5 stars and consistently praise the musical performance; no recording issues are mentioned, so a high show rating drives the overall score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer mentions soundboard vs. audience or specific audio clarity; focus is entirely on performance.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers describe the first disc as a classic, rock‑in’ beginning with spiritual jams and the second disc closing on a high note with Around > Sugar Magnolia; overall flow is called solid and magical.

band_member_comments.Keys: Brent’s keyboard work shines, delivering a clear James Bond theme quote during The Other One jam.
